beats.without: Student misses a pickup-change notice posted to Google Classroom; parent learns at 3:45 PM via panicked text.
beats.with: 7:00 AM digest flagged the change. Both parent and child saw it at breakfast.

beats.without: An OCDSB Parent Portal grade update drops overnight. Parent only finds it on Friday while clicking through the portal.
beats.with: OCDSB Parent Portal delta surfaced in Tuesday's digest with a one-line 'what changed' summary.

beats.without: Teacher posts a Google Classroom assignment due Friday. Student forgets, parent never sees it, assignment turns in late.
beats.with: Assignment appears in the student's study plan and the parent's morning brief with a due-date countdown.

beats.without: A Teams meeting with a Resource teacher is rescheduled. Parent shows up to the old slot.
beats.with: Teams reschedule caught by the digest the same morning; calendar updated, parent arrives on time.

beats.without: Weekend field-trip permission form was buried in Google Classroom three days ago. It's due Monday and the parent just found out.
beats.with: Permission form flagged in Tuesday's digest with a 'respond by' date. Signed and returned by Wednesday.
